race.comment: A good Federal. DUPLI KATE (7) has had two trials in readiness for this, the latest here with McDougall on board. He's 3/3 when riding this mare who continues to progress nicely through the grades. Not far away in a good race in town when fresh last prep and she can resume with a bang here. WEST OF DALBY (4) will find this easier than recent efforts when beaten 1.4L at Canterbury last start when flying late. Heywood rides now from a better draw and it wouldn't surprise to see her go one better this time around. TEYLU (5) has returned in good order despite not winning, knocked off in the Wagga Town Plate prelude recently. That horse was runner-up in Wagga's feature sprint - so the form has stood up. Has the speed to work across and can be in this for a very long way. KEIKOKU (8) continues to race well and can't be left out of calculations. CYCLONE RUPERT (15) is better than he showed last time out and can turn his form around.
